name: okta_idp_create_modify
description: An Identity Provider was created or modified (eventType contains 'system.idp.lifecycle').

validation.notes: Portable. Zero system.idp.lifecycle.* events in 90d. IdP creation/modification is rare and security-critical (adds a federation trust). Panther severity = HIGH when the action is 'create', else MEDIUM; reproduce with a second trigger filtering okta.event.type = system.idp.lifecycle.create, or split by action via the okta.event.type breakdown.
